message: test: split store tests by domain

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+package store
+
+import (
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"syscall"
+	"testing"
+)
+
+func TestDBFilePermissions(t *testing.T) {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	path := filepath.Join(dir, "test.db")
+	old := syscall.Umask(0o022)
+	defer syscall.Umask(old)
+
+	db, err := Open(path)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("Open: %v", err)
+	}
+	defer db.Close()
+
+	info, err := os.Stat(path)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("Stat: %v", err)
+	}
+	if got := info.Mode().Perm(); got != 0o600 {
+		t.Fatalf("DB mode = %04o, want 0600", got)
+	}
+}
